results.title: Skateboard Trucks Buying Guide - Everything You Should Know
results.snippet: Baseplate The baseplate is the metal or aluminum plate which is attached to your skateboard. It has 4 holes where the crews and bolts go, a pivot hole where the hanger and pivot cup are attached, and one hole for the kingpin. results.title: Skateboard Trucks Buying Guide - Skate Warehouse
results.snippet: Skateboard Truck Anatomy Baseplate: The flat piece of the truck that attaches to the deck. It provides the foundation for other truck components and ensures stability.
